text: >> Hello. Can you hear me? >> I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? >> Not interested. >> Can you please tell me why you're not interested?
